mapper.sql: history_id, employee_id, event_type, event_date, description, old_value, new_value, created_at, created_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM employee_history WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY event_date DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM employee_history WHERE event_type = #{eventType} ORDER BY event_date DESC
SELECT FROM employee_history WHERE event_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY event_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE employee_history SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, event_type = #{eventType}, event_date = #{eventDate}, description = #{description}, old_value = #{oldValue}, new_value = #{newValue} WHERE history_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM employee_history WHERE history_id = #{id})
